original: "Harry Potterand the Goblet of Fire", the 4th film based on the books byJ. K. Rowling, premieres in London. Goes on to become most successful film of the year, earning almost US$ 900 million.

Supernova is observed in constellation known as Cassiopeia

CSS Shenandoah is the last Confederate combat unit to surrender in the American Civil War after circumnavigating the globe on a cruise that sinks or captures 38 vessels

New York State adopts a constitutional amendment giving women the right to vote in state elections

Japan & MLB all stars played to a 6-6 draw (Game 2 of 7)
